headline: S&P Unveils Blockchain Index for 40 Digital Assets

article.summary: The benchmark tracks blockchain networks using protocol revenue, offering an alternative to traditional market capitalization-weighted crypto indexes.

headline: $1M Crypto PAC Injection Boosts Michigan Primary

article.summary: Donavan McKinney, running against Michigan incumbent Shri Thanedar, said that “the crypto lobby is paying my opponent back for helping Trump“ with the PAC-funded ads.

article.title: Gold Holds Gain as Dip-Buying Counters Inflation Fears From War
article.summary: Gold held gains on dip-buying even as hostilities in the Middle East pushed oil prices to multiweek highs, rekindling concerns that US inflationary pressure could prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

headline: Oil Prices Surge 4% Amid Global Supply Crisis

article.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 23
article.summary: Oil surged after Iran-backed Houthi militants said they attacked two Saudi Arabian tankers in the Red Sea, escalating the Middle East conflict and threatening deeper supply disruptions.
